prompts.name: Centered Composition
prompts.text: Use centered composition to make the subject clear, balanced, and visually stable.

prompts.name: Rule of Thirds
prompts.text: Use rule-of-thirds composition for natural balance and pleasing visual structure.

prompts.name: Symmetrical Composition
prompts.text: Use symmetrical composition with balanced elements and clean visual order.

prompts.name: Dynamic Composition
prompts.text: Use dynamic composition with diagonal energy, movement, and visual momentum.

prompts.name: Negative Space
prompts.text: Use negative space to create breathing room, visual elegance, and strong subject focus.

prompts.name: Leading Lines
prompts.text: Use leading lines in the environment to guide attention toward the subject.

prompts.name: Close Up
prompts.text: Use close-up composition to emphasize facial expression, eyes, and emotional detail.

prompts.name: Full Body
prompts.text: Use full-body composition to clearly show the subject's pose, outfit, and silhouette.

prompts.name: Environmental Composition
prompts.text: Use environmental composition that balances the subject with meaningful background detail.

prompts.name: Candid Composition
prompts.text: Use candid composition with natural posture, imperfect framing, and a believable moment-in-time feel.

prompts.name: Cinematic Wide
prompts.text: Use cinematic wide framing with strong environment, dramatic spacing, and visual storytelling.

prompts.name: Vertical Portrait
prompts.text: Use vertical portrait framing that focuses on the subject's face, outfit, and body line.

prompts.name: Layered Depth
prompts.text: Create layered depth with foreground, subject, and background elements clearly separated.

prompts.name: Minimal Composition
prompts.text: Use minimal composition with clean shapes, reduced clutter, and strong visual clarity.

prompts.name: Storytelling Composition
prompts.text: Use storytelling composition where pose, setting, lighting, and details suggest a clear moment or narrative.
